case_title: PAMELA SNYDER VS. AT & T COMMUNICATIONS OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNYDER, PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AT & T COMMUNICATIONS OF CALIFORNIA THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO SUSTAIN PLAINTIFF'S BURDEN OF PROOF.
